equity_history.note: Initial portfolio opened. Equity reflects 1h after open with small negative PnL.

positions.thesis: AI semis king. $725B hyperscaler 2026 capex strong, no signs of demand softening. Q1 FY27 earnings May 20 expected blowout — single biggest catalyst in tape.
positions.macro_tailwind: AI capex supercycle continues; HBM supply pre-committed through 2027
positions.expected_catalyst: Q1 FY27 earnings — expected beat on data center revenue and Blackwell ramp
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $217.90 as default tier AI semi exposure. Earnings May 20 is binary catalyst.

positions.thesis: AI semis. Q1'26 blowout just reported (May 5): Data Center +57% to $5.8B, Q2 guide $11.2B (+46% YoY). MI450 ramp expected 2H26 underappreciated. Clean post-earnings window.
positions.macro_tailwind: AI capex supercycle, share gains in inference workloads
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $443.37 as default tier AI semi. Just reported clean Q1, hold through MI450 ramp.

positions.thesis: AI memory/HBM cycle. +91% 3M momentum, +228% 6M, +768% 1Y. HBM supply constrained through 2027, pricing power. Pure-play on AI memory demand.
positions.macro_tailwind: HBM shortage, multi-quarter pricing cycle, AI training memory demand
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $747.38. Memory cycle pricing thesis multi-quarter.

positions.thesis: AI custom chips. $73B AI backlog, OpenAI partnership, Q1 AI semis +106%. Clean window — Q2 earnings June 3.

positions.expected_catalyst: Q2 earnings — expected to raise AI guidance
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $418.80. Clean earnings window, AI backlog accelerating.

positions.thesis: AI data center power/cooling pure-play. $9.5B backlog, +30% Q1 revenue, only pure-play covering UPS + liquid cooling for AI racks. 100K-GPU clusters force liquid-to-chip cooling adoption.
positions.macro_tailwind: AI infra capex digestion — power and cooling are bottleneck, not chips
positions.expected_catalyst: Q2 earnings late July, continued backlog growth
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $353.80. Strong momentum (+55% 3M), AI infra pure-play.

positions.thesis: Mega-cap tech. Cloud +63% reaccelerating, Q1 beat on every line. AI Overviews driving search engagement. DOJ antitrust overhang already priced in.
positions.expected_catalyst: Secular thesis, no near-term binary catalyst

positions.thesis: Mega-cap tech. AWS +28% best in 15 quarters, Q1 EPS $2.78 vs $1.64 est. Retail margin expansion. Capex spook already digested.
Cybersec compounder. ARR growth reaccelerated to 73% YoY, Falcon Flex +200%, vendor consolidation tailwind. Post-July'24 outage overhang fading.

positions.thesis: Uranium renaissance hedge against AI semi concentration. Western contracting cycle re-opens 2027 with Cameco contracts rolling off. India $2.6B supply deal locked. Scotiabank PT $175. Long-term structural thesis — multi-year reset, no specific near-term catalyst.
positions.macro_tailwind: AI hyperscaler nuclear power demand; uranium supply deficit by 2030
positions.expected_catalyst: Contracting cycle inflection summer 2026 onwards (long-term, no specific date)
history: 2026-05-12: Opened at $114.77 as uranium hedge. Long-term structural thesis, expect to hold through multiple runs.

positions.thesis: Gold safe-haven hedge. Gold realized prices $4,861/oz in Q1 (+68% YoY). Iran-Hormuz crisis premium. Mining equities still lag spot — 'great golden disconnect'. JPM gold target $5,055 Q4.
positions.macro_tailwind: Geopolitical risk premium (Iran, Russia/Ukraine), Fed pivot risk, central bank gold buying
positions.expected_catalyst: Continued FCF generation + buybacks; gold price gains if Middle East persists (long-term)

strategy_notes: 2026-05-12T14:42 UTC: Initial portfolio created with 10 positions × $900 each (~9% weight), $988 cash buffer. All DEFAULT tier initially.
2026-05-12T16:19 UTC: Switched to AGGRESSIVE preset (12% default / 20% high-conviction tier, -12% stop-loss, allow small/mid caps, allow pre-revenue with <30d catalyst).
2026-05-12T18:16 UTC: Smart Trading Rules added — patience with existing positions + aggression on opportunities. Profit-take rule at +20%. Quality dip-buy mandate.
